en-US.title: Hello World
en-US.subtitle: The tap game that ships itself
en-US.description: Hello World is a tiny tap game with one button and a global leaderboard. It exists to show how Launch builds, signs, and ships a real Expo app to both stores from your own machine — no Expo bill, your keys, your buckets.
en-US.promotionalText: Now with a Pro tier and a worldwide Top Tappers leaderboard.
en-US.releaseNotes: Faster taps, fewer bugs, and a brand-new Pro tier.

en-US.title: Hello World
